extraction.one_line_summary: FULGSANG Jakob attacked from 17km breakaway, held off GEOGHEGAN HART by 22 seconds after ROGLIC successfully defended red jersey despite visible vulnerability late on final climb.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIC isolated 1km from summit but limited losses through pacing control rather than attacking strength, revealing defensive posture.
LOPEZ Superman and POGACAR cooperated despite 17-second GC gap between them, prioritizing time gains over teammate VALVERDE who was dropped.
BRAMBILLA refused pulls in break before cracking, suggesting teams sending riders up road without fitness to contribute tactically.
BOUCHER attacked too early for KOM points on first climb, allowing MADRAZO to respond and contest, showing anxiety cost him efficiency.

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: negative: isolated and visibly vulnerable final kilometer, gained breathing space only through rivals' hesitation not own strength
rider_signals.LOPEZ Superman: positive: found climbing legs after poor recent form, prioritized GC over protecting dropped teammate Valverde
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: collaborated with Lopez despite being GC rivals, showed tactical maturity to maximize time gains on others
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: negative: dropped from GC group and required Movistar pacing to limit losses to 21 seconds, concerning for second place
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: lost over 2 minutes and slipped from 5th to 6th, dropped to Valverde group indicating declining form
rider_signals.GEOGHEGAN HART Tao: positive: chased down 17-second gap on Fulgsang alone after breakaway split, finishing second shows strong climbing development
rider_signals.FULGSANG Jakob: positive: attacked 17km climb from breakaway and held off strong chaser, career-best form after Tour disappointment
